raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Slauehts laid irr tas
KUNGS taws Deews / kam
labs Prahts pee teuis irr/ to J-
faeta Gohda-Krehfsu tew doh-
dams/ tapehz ka tas KUNGS
Israelu mihto/ un tew par Keh-
nixu eezehlis/ ka tew buhs Tee-
fu un Taifnibu padarriht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Un wiꞥza dewe tam Keh-
nixam fiints un diwidefimts
Talentus Selta/ un fohti dands
dahrgu Sahtu un dahrgu Ak-
mixu/ tik dands dahrgu Sahtu
ne nahze wairs tur/ ka ta Keh-
nixinne no Sabas tam Kehni-
nam Salamanain deive.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Ir Irama Laiwag / kas
no Owira Seltu atwedde/ netfe
no Owira fohti dauds Almugim
Kohku un dahrgu Akminu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "12. Un tas Kehniasch Sala-
mans darrija no ta Almugim
Kohka Stabbus preekfch ta
KUNGA Namna / un preekfch
ta Kehnixa Namna/ un Kohfles/
un Schina-Stabules preekfch
teem Dseedatajeem. Tahds Al-
mugim Kohks ne bija wehl nah-
zis neds redsehts tappis lihds
fhodeen.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "13. Un tas Kehniasch Sala-
mans dewe tai Kehnixinnei no
Sabas pehz wiꞥfu winnas lab-
bu Prahtu/ ko winna luhdse/ bes-
ta/ ko tas Kehniasch Salamans
winnat nelubgts dewe. Un ta
greeehs atpakak/ un gahje ar
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "14. Un tas Selts / kas Sa-
lamanam weena Gadda nahze-
fivehre feſchtints feſchdefmits un
feſchus Talentus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. Bes ta/ kas no Prezzi-
neekeem / un no to Apteekeeru
Prezzes/ un no wiﬀeem Arabi-
jas Kehnixeem / un no wiﬀeem
Warreneem tahs Seimmes doht-
ktua.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "16. Un tas Kehniasch Sala-
mans darrija diwisints preekfch-
turranas Brukkas no fittama
Selta/ feſchtints Selta Gabba-
lus eedeiwe wiꞥsch preekfch wee-
nahin preekfchturrainahm Bruk-
kahin.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "17. Un trihefints fedsamas
Brukkas no fittama Selta /
trihs Mahrzinus Selta eedeiwe
wiꞥsch preekfch weenahm fedsa-
mahm Brukkahin. Un tas Keh-
niasch likte to eekfch ta Namna
no Libbanus Mescha.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "18. Un tas Kehniasch darrija
arridsan weenu leelu Krehfsu no
Elewantu-Rauleem / un pahr-
wilke to ar tihra Seltu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "19. Schim Krehfsam bija
feſchas Pakahpes/ un ta Krehfsa
Galwa bija pakak appata/ un
abbejo sSahnos bija Lehnese lihds
tam Sehdekam/ un diwi Lau-
was stahweja pee tahm Lehnehm/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "20. Un diwipadefimits Lau-
was stahweja tur us tahm Pa-
kahpehm abbejas Puﬀes/ tahds
ne irr ne kahda Walstiva darrihts.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
